title: John Jordan’s CV
text:
Data Science Student

johndeejordanjr@gmail.com | +16786720626 | LinkedIn | Blackfoot, ID 83221



Student at BYUI majoring in data science and minoring in economics. Authorized to work in the US for any employer.


Technical: Python Polars, SQL, Schematics, HVAC, Appliance repair General: Communication skills, Teaching, Organizational skills, Customer service




Current BYUI - Majoring in data science - Minoring in economics - Member of Data Science Society
August 2018 - May 2022 Bennett High School, Bennett, CO - High school diploma



June 2023 - June 2025 The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, Lawrenceville, GA - Full Time Missionary - Built relationships with many different people of different cultures and engaged in meaningful dialogue. - Performed service for various food pantries and supported those who had trouble caring for themselves. - Led a team of 23 volunteers in organizing and planning strategies for how we could be most successful.
May 2022 - June 2023 ACTION APPLIANCE, Aurora, CO - Appliance Technician - Diagnosed and repaired various types of appliances, including refrigerators, dishwashers, ovens, and washing machines. - Maintained accurate records of all service calls, including details of repairs performed and parts used. - Provided excellent customer service by addressing client concerns in a professional manner and ensuring their satisfaction with the repair work.
